rows.notes: All extractors agree on description, type, and absence of monetary values. Clear header.

Extractors agree on monetary amounts (19.3.8). gemini-flash's description '1421.1.8 (cons. Q.D)' is a more accurate visual match to the ledger text than gpt-5-mini's '1421 1.0 - (cons. O.T.D.)'.
Extractors agree on monetary amounts (9.16.6). gemini-flash's description 'Do - on 546 - 9 4/pr.Ct Do' is a more accurate visual match to the ledger text than gpt-5-mini's 'Do on 546 - 9 4 pr lt da'.

Extractors agree on monetary amounts (19.3.8). gemini-flash's description 'Do - on 1421.1.8 - as before' is a more accurate visual match to the ledger text (especially the '1.8') than gpt-5-mini's 'Do on 1421 1.1.8 - as before'.

Visual verification confirms no monetary amount in the dedicated columns for this row; a horizontal line appears below the description, indicating a total on the next line. gemini-flash correctly identified no amount, while gpt-5-mini hallucinated an amount. The full description 'Do - on 546 - -9 Das' was visually verified from the ledger, correcting minor omissions from both candidates.

Extractors agree on the normalized monetary amount (2.18.4) derived from the written '58-4' (58 shillings, 4 pence). The image shows no descriptive text on the left for this total line, so gemini-flash's empty description is chosen over gpt-5-mini's '-'.
